title: symplocos racemosa var. racemosa
intro: Symplocos racemosa var. racemosa, also known as the Indian alstonia or heartleaf, is a plant species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, as well as having antioxidant and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Symplocos racemosa var. racemosa is often used in the form of a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
